notes: Bootstrap self-audit run: QPB audited against itself at v1.4.5. Baseline phases completed, then gap iteration added BUG-017..BUG-019, unfiltered iteration added BUG-020..BUG-023, parity iteration added BUG-024..BUG-025 around gate-side filename-matrix drift, and adversarial iteration added BUG-026..BUG-027 around helper-side artifact-discovery permissiveness.
